title: Bio-Bacta
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Bio-Bacta''' was a biotechnical form of [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]], which was typically synthesized. It was manufactured specifically for use in the field, and was often seen in the form of small [[Bacta tank/Legends|bacta tanks]] suitable for transportation by a single person. Minor wounds could be nearly perfectly healed with Bio-Bacta, though for extensive injuries a full-size bacta tank was usually still necessary.

{{Stub}}
